<!-- Generated by Retort -->
# OmniPost -- Quality Gates

All quality gates must pass before merging to main. Run `pnpm check-all` to execute all gates in sequence.

---

## Gates

### 1. Lint

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Command** | `pnpm lint` |
| **Tool** | ESLint 9 with Next.js, TypeScript, and React plugins |
| **Config** | `eslint.config.mjs` |
| **Fix** | `pnpm lint:fix` |

Enforces code quality rules including TypeScript strict checks, React hooks rules, and Next.js best practices.

### 2. Type Check

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Command** | `pnpm type-check` |
| **Tool** | TypeScript 5.3 compiler (`tsc --noEmit`) |
| **Config** | `tsconfig.json` |
| **Mode** | Strict (no `any`, strict null checks, strict function types) |

Validates all TypeScript types compile without errors in strict mode.

### 3. Test

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Command** | `pnpm test` |
| **Tool** | Jest 29 with ts-jest |
| **Config** | `jest.config.js` |
| **Coverage** | `pnpm test:coverage` |
| **Target** | 80% line coverage |

Runs the full Jest test suite including unit tests, component tests (React Testing Library), and accessibility tests (jest-axe).

### 4. Format

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Command** | `pnpm format:check` |
| **Tool** | Prettier 3 |
| **Fix** | `pnpm format` |
| **Scope** | `**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,json,css,md}` |

Verifies consistent code formatting. Run `pnpm format` to auto-fix.

### 5. Check All (Combined)

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Command** | `pnpm check-all` |
| **Sequence** | type-check -> lint -> format:check -> test |

Runs all quality gates in order. This is the pre-merge and pre-PR gate.

---

## Coverage Target

| Metric | Target |
|--------|--------|
| Line coverage | 80% |
| Branch coverage | 80% |
| Function coverage | 80% |

Run `pnpm test:coverage` to generate a coverage report and verify thresholds.

---

## Workflow Integration

- **CI Pipeline:** `.github/workflows/ci.yml` runs `pnpm check-all` on every push and PR
- **Pre-PR:** Run `pnpm check-all` locally before creating a pull request
- **Branch Protection:** All checks must pass before merge to main
